name: Dridex Process Pattern Detected
description: Detects process patterns commonly associated with Dridex malware infections. This rule identifies suspicious command-line arguments and parent-child process relationships involving svchost.exe.

prompts.prompt: Dridex malware process pattern detected. This could be svchost.exe running from a user's Desktop or svchost.exe as a parent to recon commands. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **Parent Process Name** {parent_process_name}, **Command** {command}. Investigate this critical event for signs of a Dridex infection or other malicious activity.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for Process Creation (e.g., 1).

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the detected process (e.g., svchost.exe).

parameters.name: parent_process_name
parameters.description: The parent process of the detected process.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: The full command line of the process.
